steps.title: Use the adoption statistic
steps.content: The passage says Sequoyah's script was easy to learn and that by 1830 over 90 percent of Cherokee people could read and write it. That statistic shows broad adoption.

steps.title: Choose the scope word
steps.content: B describes manner, not how common the use was. C contradicts the deliberate creation of the script, and D contradicts the high adoption rate. The answer is A.
